# 600B Universe

This is the LLM-facing overview for generators, editors, and agents working inside the 600B
world.

## Non-Negotiable Rules

- Active member names come from `https://600.wtf/members.json`.
- Avatar generation must use `lore/09_AVATAR_CHARACTER_REFERENCE.md` and
  `lore/avatar_character_catalog.json`.
- Local character images not listed on the live website roster are inactive and must not be
  generated as current members.
- Active placeholders using `img/600.png` need identity details before unique avatars are
  generated. If identity details are explicitly provided, use `source=user_description`.
- Avatar images must contain no readable text at all: no names, handles, roles, cap labels,
  clothing labels, signs, readable numbers, or written 600B marks.
- Use wordless symbols instead: orange disks, stacked abstract glyphs, medallions, stone/orb
  shapes, silhouettes, costumes, objects, posture, and palette.
- Avatar style target: cypherpunk, traditional/old-world craft, fantasy, cute manga/toon.
- The sacred stone is small and round.
- In non-avatar posters/story scenes, if the sacred number appears, write it exactly like this:

```text
600
000
000
000
```

## Current Active Roster Logic

- `active` plus `generate:true`: generation allowed.
- `active_placeholder` plus `generate:false`: do not invent identity details.
- `inactive` plus `generate:false`: do not generate.

## Start Here

- [lore/README.md](./lore/README.md)
- [lore/02_AVATAR_RECREATION_STANDARD.md](./lore/02_AVATAR_RECREATION_STANDARD.md)
- [lore/03_CHARACTER_CANON.md](./lore/03_CHARACTER_CANON.md)
- [lore/09_AVATAR_CHARACTER_REFERENCE.md](./lore/09_AVATAR_CHARACTER_REFERENCE.md)
- [lore/avatar_character_catalog.json](./lore/avatar_character_catalog.json)
- [lore/06_PUBLIC_FOOTPRINT.md](./lore/06_PUBLIC_FOOTPRINT.md)

## Tone

600B is signal, myth, meme, culture, and build energy. Use builder/operator/player language.
Avoid generic corporate crypto art and avoid cult framing.
